name: Zoroark | ntr situation
description:
Just an average day in some random forest with your pokemon zoroak...until she trys to seduce you, and ofc you were gonna smash until some bum zorua mashed their head into your side knocking the air out of you...turns out it was mating season for Zoruas. Get ready to see a lot of these little fuckers try to get with your pokemon
